ci_support_linux_64_python3.10.____cpyth:
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
occt:
- 7.9.3
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
target_platform:
- linux-64
zlib:
- '1'

about.description:
NETGEN is an automatic 3d tetrahedral mesh generator with Python interface.
It accepts input from constructive solid geometry (CSG) or boundary representation (BRep)
from STL file format. The connection to a geometry kernel (OCCT) allows the handling
of IGES and STEP files. NETGEN contains modules for mesh optimization and
hierarchical mesh refinement. Open source, LGPL license; available for Linux, macOS and Windows.
about.summary: Automatic 3d tetrahedral mesh generator with Python interface

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  name: netgen
  version: "6.2.2601"
  sha256: "14bb144f4cd5c7a6a56a1156b6eab1b7cf157699c237afe1f83bb0c2951db46e"

package:
  name: ${{ name }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/looooo/netgen/archive/refs/tags/v${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: ${{ sha256 }}
  patches:
    - patches/fix-egg-info-name.patch

build:
  number: 1

requirements:
  build:
    - ${{ stdlib("c") }}
    - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
    - ninja
    - cmake
  host:
    - occt
    - python
    - pybind11 ==3.0.1
    - zlib
  run:
    - occt
    - python
    - zlib
    - numpy

tests:
  # On macOS the generic `python: imports` test often segfaults before any extra test runs
  # (single conda_build_script.py order). Use only the debug script on osx; linux/win keep imports.
  - if: not osx
    then:
      - python:
          imports:
            - netgen
            - numpy

  - if: osx
    then:
      - script:
          - bash -ec 'export PYTHONFAULTHANDLER=1 OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1 MKL_NUM_THREADS=1 VECLIB_MAXIMUM_THREADS=1 NUMEXPR_NUM_THREADS=1; python debug_osx_import.py'
        files:
          # `source` = files from extracted tarball ($SRC_DIR); `recipe` = recipe dir ($RECIPE_DIR)
          recipe:
            - debug_osx_import.py

about:
  license: LGPL-2.1-only
  license_file: LICENSE
  summary: Automatic 3d tetrahedral mesh generator with Python interface
  description: |
    NETGEN is an automatic 3d tetrahedral mesh generator with Python interface.
    It accepts input from constructive solid geometry (CSG) or boundary representation (BRep)
    from STL file format. The connection to a geometry kernel (OCCT) allows the handling
    of IGES and STEP files. NETGEN contains modules for mesh optimization and
    hierarchical mesh refinement. Open source, LGPL license; available for Linux, macOS and Windows.
  homepage: https://ngsolve.org
  repository: https://github.com/NGSolve/netgen
  documentation: https://ngsolve.org

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - looooo

about.description:
NETGEN is an automatic 3d tetrahedral mesh generator with Python interface.
It accepts input from constructive solid geometry (CSG) or boundary representation (BRep)
from STL file format. The connection to a geometry kernel (OCCT) allows the handling
of IGES and STEP files. NETGEN contains modules for mesh optimization and
hierarchical mesh refinement. Open source, LGPL license; available for Linux, macOS and Windows.
about.summary: Automatic 3d tetrahedral mesh generator with Python interface
